ai_summary: Electrosteel Castings Limited has successfully completed planned annual maintenance at its Khardah Works, with its MBF Production Facility having resumed operations on June 24, 2026, and the Main Plant scheduled for June 25, 2026. This marks the swift return to full operational capacity following a routine and anticipated production interruption. No red flags are indicated, as the maintenance was planned and completed on schedule, signaling a stable operational update.
